items.title: Researchers flag TrapDoor malware campaign targeting crypto developer environments including Aptos, Sui and Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: The TrapDoor malware targeting crypto developer environments could pose security risks for Solana's ecosystem, potentially impacting developer confidence and project integrity.

items.title: Report: Solana Activity Hits Record High Despite SOL’s 33% Q1 Drop
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite a significant drop in SOL's price, the record high activity indicates strong user engagement and resilience in the Solana ecosystem, which could attract future investment.

items.title: Tether plans GELT stablecoin launch with support from Georgian government
items.whyYouShouldCare: Tether's GELT stablecoin launch, backed by the Georgian government, could enhance liquidity options in the market, indirectly influencing Solana's trading dynamics.
